domains: From Molecules to Organisms: Structures and Processes

nodes.title: People encounter questions about the natural world every day

nodes.title: People depend on various technologies in their lives
nodes.description: People depend on various technologies in their lives; human life would be very different without technology.

nodes.title: Designs can be conveyed through sketches, drawings, or physical models
nodes.description: Designs can be conveyed through sketches, drawings, or physical models. These representations are useful in communicating ideas for a problem's solutions to other people.

nodes.title: Things that people do to live comfortably can affect the world around them
nodes.description: Things that people do to live comfortably can affect the world around them. But they can make choices that reduce their impacts on the land, water, air, and other living things.

academic_standards.description: Things that people do to live comfortably can affect the world around them. But they can make choices that reduce their impacts on the land, water, air, and other living things.

nodes.title: Some kinds of severe weather are more likely than others in a given region
nodes.description: Some kinds of severe weather are more likely than others in a given region. Weather scientists forecast severe weather so that the communities can prepare for and respond to these events.

academic_standards.description: Some kinds of severe weather are more likely than others in a given region. Weather scientists forecast severe weather so that the communities can prepare for and respond to these events.

nodes.title: Living things need water, air, and resources from the land, and they live in ...
nodes.description: Living things need water, air, and resources from the land, and they live in places that have the things they need. Humans use natural resources for everything they do.

academic_standards.description: Living things need water, air, and resources from the land, and they live in places that have the things they need. Humans use natural resources for everything they do.

nodes.title: Plants and animals can change their environment
nodes.description: Plants and animals can change their environment.

nodes.title: Weather is the combination of sunlight, wind, snow or rain, and temperature i...
nodes.description: Weather is the combination of sunlight, wind, snow or rain, and temperature in a particular region at a particular time. People measure these conditions to describe and record the weather and to notice patterns over time.

academic_standards.description: Weather is the combination of sunlight, wind, snow or rain, and temperature in a particular region at a particular time. People measure these conditions to describe and record the weather and to notice patterns over time.

nodes.title: All animals need food in order to live and grow
nodes.description: All animals need food in order to live and grow. They obtain their food from plants or from other animals. Plants need water and light to live and grow.

academic_standards.description: All animals need food in order to live and grow. They obtain their food from plants or from other animals. Plants need water and light to live and grow.
